title: Apple Reports Record Q1 Revenue Driven by iPhone 15 Sales
description: Apple Inc. reported its highest ever Q1 revenue, with iPhone 15 driving strong demand.

title: Bitcoin Surges Past $45,000 as ETF Approval Speculation Grows
description: Bitcoin reached a six-month high as traders speculate on SEC approval of a spot ETF.

title: NVIDIA GPU Demand Remains Strong Amid AI Infrastructure Boom
description: NVIDIA continues to see unprecedented demand for its H100 chips from hyperscalers.

title: ECB Signals Potential Rate Cuts in 2024 as Inflation Cools
description: European Central Bank officials indicated that rate cuts could be on the table if inflation continues to moderate.

title: Microsoft Azure Revenue Grows 28% as AI Adoption Accelerates
description: Microsoft reported Azure cloud revenue growth of 28% YoY, driven by AI integration.
